ai_tips: Starting out at 4m — 9.19km ahead with 16m of climbing on the profile. 从海拔4米出发——全程9.19公里，累计爬升16米。
0.83km in — pace 6:28/km as the effort builds. 进行到0.83公里——配速6:28/公里，强度正在建立。
Mid-run at 5.01km — the route is largely flat to downhill (total climb just 2m), so rhythm matters more than strength. 进行到5.01公里过半程——路线以平路和下坡为主（总爬升仅2米），节奏比力量更关键。
High point of the route: 6m at 1.28km. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点6米，位于1.28公里处。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -12.8% at 3.02km — you let it flow at 6:37/km, good downhill confidence. 全天最陡的下坡：3.02公里处坡度-12.8%——你顺势加速到6:37/公里，下坡信心不错。
7.97km — late-run check: pace 4:15/km, still holding form well. 7.97公里——后程检查：配速4:15/公里，节奏保持得不错。
Finished 9.19km in 61:12 (avg 6:39/km, +16m). Solid, steady effort end to end. 完成9.19公里，用时61:12（平均配速6:39/公里，爬升16米）。全程稳定扎实。
